name: NARSSA Transfer (South Africa)
description: South African National Archives and Records Service Act 1996 compliance — generates NARSSA-compliant transfer manifests (METS-EAD2002 XML + digital files + manifest.csv) for records reaching disposal-due via the ahgExtendedRightsPlugin disposal workflow.
author: The Archive and Heritage Group (Pty) Ltd

suggests.ahgAuditTrailPlugin: Dual-write of transfer events into the central audit feed
suggests.ahgSecurityClearancePlugin: Mark transferred records as restricted-access at the receiving archive
